verdict_reasoning: HSPA5 (BiP/GRP78) is canonically an ER lumen chaperone (KDEL-retained), but is well-documented to translocate to the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane on tumor cells and under ER stress as 'cell-surface GRP78' (csGRP78). This ecto-pool is the basis of multiple clinical-stage surface-directed programs (anti-GRP78 antibodies, GRP78-targeted peptide-drug conjugates, CAR-T). Maps to cell_state_induced (oncogenic transformation + ER stress).
